description: A painting of the facade of St. Mark's Basilica in Venice, rendered in muted tones against a pale green sky. The elaborate facade shows multiple arched portals, gold mosaics in the lunettes, Gothic pinnacles, and large domes topped with golden crosses. Flags hang from flagpoles on either side. Small figures are visible at the base providing scale. The painting captures the basilica's characteristic blend of Byzantine, Gothic, and Renaissance elements in a subdued, atmospheric palette that emphasizes the building's monumental presence and aged grandeur.
